hotel.name: Barceló Funchal Oldtown
hotel.review_summary: Guests praise the unbeatable Old Town location and rooftop pool, noting the blend of historic Madeiran architecture with clean contemporary rooms and genuinely warm local staff.

hotel_alt.name: Hotel PortoBay Santa Maria
hotel_alt.review_summary: Consistently rated Madeira's top-value option — reviewers single out the seafront promenade setting, excellent pool area, and reliable airport transfers.

activities.title: Old Funchal Walking Tour
activities.description: Guided walk through Funchal's historic core — cathedral, Carmo Arch, and Zona Velha murals — with expert local storytelling.

activities.title: Funchal City Tour + Old Town (Private)
activities.description: Private tuk-tuk circuit of city highlights, Old Town street art, and cable-car viewpoint — ideal orientation for first-timers.

activities.title: Levada do Caldeirão Verde — Self-Guided Hike
activities.description: Transfer to Queimadas Forest Park for the most dramatic levada in the north — tunnels, waterfalls, and emerald canyon walls in near-solitude.

activities.title: The East Tour — Pico do Areeiro, Santana & Pico do Facho (Small Group)
activities.description: Small-group loop to Madeira's highest summit, traditional thatched Santana village, and Pico do Facho's panoramic Atlantic views.

activities.title: Stairway to Heaven — Pico do Areeiro Summit Hike
activities.description: Early-morning ridge hike between Pico do Areeiro and Pico Ruivo — the island's most spectacular ridge trail, above the clouds.

activities.title: Funchal: Discover Local Highlights & Traditions
activities.description: Off-beat neighbourhood walk through the markets, artisan workshops, and community spaces locals actually use.

activities.title: 25 Fountains Levada — Rabaçal Valley Hiking Tour (PR6)
activities.description: The iconic Rabaçal levada walk to the 25 fountains waterfall — laurisilva forest, mist, and some of Europe's oldest endemic trees.

activities.title: Madeira: Sunrise at Pico do Arieiro & Hike Larano Trail
activities.description: Pre-dawn drive to Pico do Arieiro (1,818m) for sunrise above the clouds, followed by the Larano coastal trail down to Porto da Cruz.

activities.title: Levada do Rei PR18 — Scenic Hike with Transfer
activities.description: Madeira's highest-rated short levada — 4h through ancient laurel forest alongside the Levada do Rei water channel, rarely crowded.
